content:
📜 4. The “Marty McFly” Disappearance System

📜 Absences now affect the entire class AND the absent student.

✔ How Absenteeism Affects the Class:
• When an absent student is selected, a global effect occurs (rolled randomly).
• Example Consequences:
• A rule is altered.
• A faction suffers a collective debuff.
• The environment shifts unpredictably.

✔ How Absenteeism Affects the Student:
• First absence: No penalty, just a warning.
• Second absence: XP loss.
• Third absence: Student becomes a “Specter.”

✔ Specter Status Penalties:
• No ability to collect items.
• Cannot vote in faction decisions.
• Must complete a special redemption task to return.

📜 Why This Works:
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 466 (chunk 466/555)
